feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is there a way to generate a requote only with the added item?
entry.content:
Dear all

Under SAP S/4 Hana cloud Public, service quotation, there is a way to requote it. But doing that, the quotation is sent and redone with the complete item and not only with the additional item.

Is there a way or a different process to have a "subsequent" quotation linked to the first one with only the added item?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: Does hard currency supported in S4HANA public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking to setup hard currency type in S4HANA public cloud system.

Please help us in confirming whether it is supported or not.

Thanks & regards,

RP

entry.title: Order is blocked by GTS, Invoice possible
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

If a Sales Order is blocked by GTS the Invoice for Service Items can be created.

Is there a specific configuration which prevents this? We can only prevent the Outbound Delivery creation.

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: API to update mass fields value for mass roles
entry.content:
We would like to know if there is an existing API that allows for updating the values of multiple fields for multiple roles. If such an API does not exist, what is the process to request the creation of a new API for this purpose?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to display account descriptions for fixed assets when printing in the Accounts Document Output
entry.content:
How can the "Details" column display account descriptions instead of just the fixed asset numbers for fixed asset original value and accumulated depreciation accounts when printing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: #CoE #DH01 how to know which Fiori app is used by which userid.
entry.content: SAP provides Display Security Audit Log app but it only shows transaction codes in the app in s4hana public cloud. It is very inappropreate from viewpoint of system audit because user use not . ransaction codes but Fiori application Is there any way to know  which Fiori app is used by which userid?

entry.title: I want to change the profit center of a sales document by item in Manage Substitution/Validation Rul
entry.content:
Manage Substitution/Validation Rules > Business Context
Profit Center Derivation in Sales Documents > Substitution Type: Substitute with field/function cannot be used

I can only use Substitute with Content

○What I want to do
I want the profit center of the details at the time of order to be "Sales office code + item profit center"

Please let me know the following:
1. Can it be used depending on how it's used?
2. How to use it
3. Is it scheduled to be released in the future?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: WBS ELEMENT RELEASE WITH WORKFLOW
entry.content:
Required WBS element release approval 

WBS element release with workflow in sap public cloud any available workflow suggest

entry.title: Assistance Required for Assigning Responsible Person to WBS Element Milestone in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
we are unable to assign the responsible person to the required WBS element milestone within the system.

Could you kindly guide us on the appropriate steps or provide any suggestions on how to resolve this issue? If there are specific configurations or settings that need to be adjusted, we would appreciate your insights.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Imputed interest for assets in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Our customer has a self-created depreciation key in his old SAP system with imputed interests. As the modification of depreciation keys is not available anymore in SAP Public cloud, i would like to ask how we can solve this problem? Is there any possibility to consider imputed interests on assets in the Public Cloud?

Imputed interests for assets is a very important topic for our customer.

entry.title: Public cloud CDS views (maintenance order & operation)
entry.content:
Dear team, for public cloud I need maintenance order and operation CDS view. please suggest some CDS view.

Thanks.

@aoyang

entry.title: How to Add a Release Approval Group for a Supplier
entry.content:
As a release approval group in the business partner management app supplier role
The following choices are available by default, but I would like to add a release approval group.
・Vendor A
・Vendor B
・Vendor C
・G/L accounts

Please tell me how to add it.

entry.title: How to get information about Sales Document Item Texts by Text Types？
entry.content:
Hi there,

We need to get information about Sales Document Item Texts by text types in Embedded SAC. We did not find any suitable standard CDS views.

How we can get this information?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Scheduling agreement for intercompany via MRP
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

Kindly some one suggest on how to create or customize intercompany (5hp) for scheduling agreement via mrp .

 

any links are highly appreciated as i can see in sap best practices for public cloud there is no sa for intercompany .

entry.title: CDS view for planned delivery time in purchasing scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Unable to find a proper CDS view for the column Planned Delivery Time of purchasing scheduling agreements.


Could you please kindly let me know which CDS view or which App that can get the data? Thanks a lot. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PTO (Project Team Orientation) SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Good afternoon,
Does anyone have a PTO (Project Team Orientation) presentation for SAP Public Cloud?

entry.title: Create a valuation grouping
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I´m in need of creating a new valuation grouping for automatic account determiantion in a different comany code, which SSCUI do i have to configure to do this? and also if needed, what other configuration activities do I need to perform?

Thank you in advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: RAP List Report aggregation missing only in deployed version
entry.content:
I've created an RAP APP ( on adt side ) to show an list report fiori app with option to navigate for detail ( also a list report ).

I neeed to have totals and subtotals so I put the anotaion @Aggregation.default: #SUM in the projection view.
When I preview the APP using Service bindiing preview option I've the totals:

When I go to details ( using associations ) I also have de totals:

After I deploy the APP using BAS I lost totals in the main view:

So I assumed that some limitation in BAS side. But if I go to the details ( in the deployed app ), I have the totals:

Since I have parameters, I'm using oDataV2 protocol.

Can you please help me identigying what could be the problem? Thanks

entry.title: Lock to duplicate lines of the same product manually and by migration.
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,
Can you help me determine if it's possible to block duplicate lines of the same product in the sales order natively or through development?

 

 

In the same way, from the app we can have a block that prevents uploading duplicate lines.

We welcome your comments.

entry.title: Public Cloud Custom Business object UI Tile
entry.content:
Dear All

We have created custom business objects using ADT in Eclipse and able to preview the App using ADT UI.

How can we assign custom business object App to a Tile in Public Cloud Environment.
